entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's company — a career tech platform that prepares and compounds applications for candidates

entities.name: Compounding Effort
entities.context: Core product philosophy: every minute a candidate invests makes all future applications easier

entities.name: Candidate Leverage
entities.context: Logan's reframe — shifting narrative from one-off tasks to long-term leverage through Careerspan

entities.name: We Prepared This Application For You
entities.context: Key product moment where Careerspan proactively adds an application to a user's account for confirmation

entities.name: SaaS Dual-Segment Constraint
entities.context: Ilya's observation that Careerspan must serve both high-volume employers (500 applicants) and selective ones (5 great candidates)

entities.name: Browser/Tech Stack Dependency
entities.context: Ilya's constraint — being at the mercy of the user's browser and tech stack as a SaaS product

entities.name: Founder Energy
entities.context: The group acknowledged V's sleep deprivation as a real system constraint on the business

entities.name: B21
entities.context: Key moments session dated 2025-12-04, a group discussion about Careerspan strategy and founder health
